description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a short-sleeved, button-up shirt with a subtle tropical pattern, paired with straight-cut jeans and casual sneakers. The shirt is loose-fitting and untucked, giving a relaxed, informal appearance suitable for urban or leisure environments. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and the hands are open, with no visible accessories or carried items. The facial features are defined, with short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven look. The jeans are slightly faded, and the sneakers are simple and practical, indicating everyday use. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a casual, approachable demeanor.
description: An adult male in a casual short-sleeved shirt, jeans, and sneakers, with short hair and a relaxed, everyday appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open-collared shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's loose fit, and the straight leg of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt with its pattern, the back of the head, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the jeans and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved button-up shirt and straight-cut jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
